positive: A detailed, symmetrical, and visually striking illustration of a stylized celestial garden. The composition features bioluminescent flora, intertwined with geometric constellations and elegant, stylized animal silhouettes (such as foxes, hummingbirds, and owls). Use a modern Art Nouveau mixed with graphic novel aesthetic. The color palette should be highly limited and contrasting: deep indigo and sapphire blues contrasted sharply with glowing emerald green and ethereal gold accents. Emphasize clean line work, thick outlines, and strong black negative space. The overall mood is mystical, magical, and elegant. The artwork must be perfectly centered, scalable, and suitable for printing on apparel.
negative: blurry, low resolution, signature, watermark, text, logo, copyright, cropped, dirty, grainy, artifacts, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, extra limbs, noise, gradient wash
